sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 프록터 앤 갬블(P&G)이 2026년 1월 분기 배당금을 주당 1.0568달러로 결정하며 69년 연속 배당 인상 기록을 이어갔습니다.

keyPoints.text: 이사회는 보통주 및 우선주에 대해 주당 1.0568달러의 분기 배당금을 지급하기로 결의했습니다.
P&G는 1890년 설립 이후 135년간 배당을 지속해왔으며, 69년 연속으로 배당금을 인상하며 주주 환원 정책을 강화했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 전 세계 약 70개국에서 운영 중이며, Always, Gillette, Pampers 등 주요 브랜드 포트폴리오를 통해 소비자에게 제품을 공급하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 69년 연속 배당 인상 기록을 유지하고 있는 P&G의 향후 현금 흐름 창출 능력과 배당 정책의 지속 가능성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 newsreleasepgjanuary2026di.htm EX-99.1 Document News Release The Procter & Gamble Company One P&G Plaza Cincinnati, OH 45202 P&G Declares Quarterly Dividend, January 2026 CINCINNATI, January 13, 2026 – The Board of Directors of The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share on the Common Stock and on the Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock of the Company, payable on or after February 17, 2026 to Common Stock shareowners of record at the close of business on January 23, 2026, and to Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock shareowners of record at the start of business on January 23, 2026. P&G has been paying a dividend for 135 consecutive years since its incorporation in 1890 and has increased its dividend for 69 consecutive years. This reinforces our commitment to return cash to shareow  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.0568 = 1.0568달러.

ners, many of whom rely on the steady, reliable income earned with their investment in P&G. About Procter & Gamble P&G serves consumers around the world with one of the strongest portfolios of trusted, quality, leadership brands, including Always®, Ambi Pur®, Ariel®, Bounty®, Charmin®, Crest®, Dawn®, Downy®, Fairy®, Febreze®, Gain®, Gillette®, Head & Shoulders®, Lenor®, Olay®, Oral-B®, Pampers®, Pantene®, SK-II®, Tide®, Vicks®, and Whisper®. The P&G community includes operations in approximately 70 countries worldwide. Please visit https://www.pg.com for the latest news and information about P&G and its brands. For other P&G news, visit us at https://www.pg.com/news . # # # P&G Media Contacts : Henry Molski +1-513-505-3587 P&G Investor Relations Contact : John Chevalier +1-513-983-9974 Category: PG-IR
